Kino animations and UI layer management with KinoLayer, KinoPlayer, and KinoReel structures and functions.

## Folders
- **[kino_reel](kino_reel/README.md)**: Morphing square, segmented scaling, and unfold transformations for KinoReel animations in Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[kino_layer.c](kino_layer.c.md)**: Implements the KinoLayer API for managing and rendering animated layers in the Pebble firmware.
- **[kino_layer.h](kino_layer.h.md)**: Defines the KinoLayer structure and functions for managing and animating UI layers in Pebble firmware.
- **[kino_player.c](kino_player.c.md)**: Implements a KinoPlayer for managing and animating KinoReels with play, pause, and rewind functions.
- **[kino_player.h](kino_player.h.md)**: Defines the KinoPlayer structure and functions for managing and animating video playback.
- **[kino_reel.c](kino_reel/README.md.c)**: Functions for creating, managing, and drawing KinoReel objects with various resource types.
- **[kino_reel.h](kino_reel/README.md.h)**: Defines the KinoReel structure and functions for managing and drawing graphical assets.
- **[kino_reel_custom.c](kino_reel/README.md_custom.c)**: Custom KinoReel implementation with functions for creation, data access, and graphics operations.
- **[kino_reel_custom.h](kino_reel/README.md_custom.h)**: Functions for creating and accessing custom KinoReel objects with associated data.
- **[kino_reel_gbitmap.c](kino_reel/README.md_gbitmap.c)**: Implements functions for creating and managing KinoReel objects with GBitmap support.
- **[kino_reel_gbitmap.h](kino_reel/README.md_gbitmap.h)**: Functions to create KinoReel objects from GBitmap or resource identifiers.
- **[kino_reel_gbitmap_private.h](kino_reel/README.md_gbitmap_private.h)**: Defines the KinoReelImplGBitmap structure and initializes it with a GBitmap.
- **[kino_reel_gbitmap_sequence.c](kino_reel/README.md_gbitmap_sequence.c)**: Implements a KinoReel for managing and rendering GBitmap sequences with elapsed time control.
- **[kino_reel_gbitmap_sequence.h](kino_reel/README.md_gbitmap_sequence.h)**: Functions to create KinoReel objects from GBitmapSequence or resource identifiers.
- **[kino_reel_pdci.c](kino_reel/README.md_pdci.c)**: Implements a KinoReel type for handling GDrawCommandImage with functions for creation and processing.
- **[kino_reel_pdci.h](kino_reel/README.md_pdci.h)**: Functions to create KinoReel objects with images or resources in the Pebble firmware.
- **[kino_reel_pdcs.c](kino_reel/README.md_pdcs.c)**: Implements the KinoReelPDCS structure for managing and drawing GDrawCommandSequences.
- **[kino_reel_pdcs.h](kino_reel/README.md_pdcs.h)**: Functions to create KinoReel objects with different resource options.
